text.message: dude you already traded the plow on me
Sorry it was a deal I couldn’t pass
ok but you didnt have to rob me
steals the wheat i hardly produce too
i guess im sorry too. blue has severely curtailed my options
think it's ur loss but you do you
Man you had to take road there instead of settle
there are two trades that work
Red blue the only one with wood
We can figure one more out
tell me why you had to rob me after facilitating my plow
give me a reason and i let it go
Because he accepted the ns for ns genius were you paying attention
